variables.notes: Explicit SG&A labels exist but are only populated in some years, so included both SG&A labels plus the broader 'Other operating expenses' bucket per the stated hierarchy to ensure coverage across years. Did not add 'R&D Expenditure' because the 2024 arithmetic indicates 'Other operating expenses' already includes R&D and other overhead components, so adding R&D would risk double counting.
